intro.title: 1. Introduction
intro.content: Welcome to Eulesia. These terms of service apply to the use of the Eulesia service ("Service"). By using the Service, you accept these terms. If you do not accept these terms, please do not use the Service.

service.title: 2. Service Description
service.content: Eulesia is an open civic infrastructure that provides a platform for democratic discussion, civic participation, and knowledge sharing. The Service is a non-profit, open-source project.

account.title: 3. User Account
account.content: Creating an account requires providing a valid email address. You are responsible for the security of your account and all activity that occurs through it. Please notify us immediately if you suspect unauthorized use of your account.

conduct.title: 4. Code of Conduct
conduct.content: You agree to use the Service lawfully and responsibly. The following are prohibited:
rules: Unauthorized sharing of other users' personal information
Technical interference with the Service or exploitation of vulnerabilities

content.title: 5. Content
content.content: You are responsible for the content you publish. You retain copyright to your own content. By providing content to the Service, you grant Eulesia a non-exclusive license to display, distribute, and archive your content as part of the Service's operation. Eulesia has the right to moderate and remove content that violates these terms.

moderation.title: 6. Moderation
moderation.content: Eulesia moderates content in accordance with the EU Digital Services Act (DSA). Moderation decisions can be appealed. Users who repeatedly violate the rules may receive warnings, account restrictions, or account termination.

privacy.title: 7. Privacy
privacy.content: The processing of your personal data is described in our Privacy Policy. By using the Service, you consent to the processing of your data in accordance with the Privacy Policy.

liability.title: 8. Limitation of Liability
liability.content: The Service is provided "as is" without warranties. Eulesia is not liable for service interruptions, data loss, or damages arising from the use of the Service. Eulesia is not responsible for content published by users.

changes.title: 9. Changes to Terms
changes.content: We may update these terms as needed. Significant changes will be communicated through the Service. By continuing to use the Service after changes, you accept the updated terms.

termination.title: 10. Account Termination
termination.content: You may delete your account at any time from the settings. Eulesia may terminate your account if you repeatedly or seriously violate the terms of service. Upon account deletion, your personal data will be removed in accordance with the Privacy Policy.

law.title: 11. Applicable Law
law.content: Finnish law applies to these terms. Any disputes will be resolved primarily through negotiation and secondarily in the District Court of Helsinki.

contact.title: 12. Contact
contact.content: Questions about the terms of service can be sent to: info@eulesia.eu

intro.title: 1. Data Controller
intro.content:
Eulesia
Email: info@eulesia.eu

This privacy policy describes how we collect, use, and protect your personal data in accordance with the EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).

data_collected.title: 2. Data Collected
data_collected.content: We collect the following personal data:
items: Name and email address (for account creation)
Login and session management data (session cookies)

purpose.title: 3. Purpose of Data Processing
purpose.content: We use your personal data for the following purposes:
items: Ensuring Service security and rule compliance
Developing the Service and fixing bugs

legal_basis.title: 4. Legal Basis
legal_basis.content:
Personal data processing is based on:
- Consent (account creation and use)
- Performance of a contract (providing the service)
- Legal obligation (DSA regulation compliance)
- Legitimate interest (security, preventing abuse)

sharing.title: 5. Data Sharing
sharing.content:
We do not sell or share your personal data with third parties for commercial purposes. Data may be shared:
- With authorities to comply with legal obligations
- With service providers processing data on our behalf (server hosting)

All service providers comply with GDPR.

retention.title: 6. Data Retention
retention.content:
Personal data is retained as long as the account is active. After account deletion:
- Personal data (name, email, profile picture) is deleted within 30 days
- Published content is anonymized (author information removed)
- Private messages are permanently deleted
- Moderation logs are retained for 1 year for legal reasons

rights.title: 7. Data Subject Rights
rights.content: You have the following rights under GDPR:
items: Right to access your data (data export from profile settings)
Right to lodge a complaint with the Finnish Data Protection Authority (tietosuoja.fi)

security.title: 8. Data Security
security.content:
We use appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal data:
- Encrypted connections (HTTPS/TLS)
- Password protection (bcrypt hashing)
- Access control and role-based permissions
- Regular security reviews

cookies.title: 9. Cookies
cookies.content:
We only use cookies that are essential for the Service's operation:
- Session cookie (maintaining login state)
- Language setting (user's chosen language)

We do not use tracking, analytics, or advertising cookies.

changes.title: 10. Changes to Policy
changes.content: We may update this policy as needed. Significant changes will be communicated to users through the Service.

contact.title: 11. Contact
contact.content:
For privacy-related questions, contact: info@eulesia.eu

You may also lodge a complaint with the Data Protection Authority:
Office of the Data Protection Ombudsman
https://tietosuoja.fi
